nasb.text: But He said to him, “Allow the dead to bury their own dead; but as for you, go and proclaim everywhere the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to him, “Leave the dead to bury their own dead. But as for you, go and proclaim the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“讓死人去埋葬他們的死人，你應該去傳揚　神的國。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“让死人去埋葬他们的死人吧，你只管去传扬上帝国的福音。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“让死人去埋葬他们的死人吧。至于你，你要去宣讲神的国。”
